title: lycianthes sancti-caroli
intro: Lycianthes sancti-caroli, also known as the Santa Cruz cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Lycianthes sancti-caroli include the ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as a tea or used topically, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
